SEARCH
Package compiler.ast

Class MutatorVisitor

java.lang.Object
compiler.ast.MutatorVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
ASTVisitor<ASTNode>
public final class MutatorVisitor extends Object implements ASTVisitor<ASTNode>
Applies random structural mutations to AST programs. This visitor is primarily used for fuzzing, robustness checks, and mutation-style experiments that require syntactically valid but varied tree structures.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    MutatorVisitor(Random random)
    Creates a new mutator with the given random source.

  • Constructor Details

    • MutatorVisitor

      public MutatorVisitor(Random random)
      Creates a new mutator with the given random source. This constructor is used for instance-based mutation calls.
      Parameters:
      random - randomness source for mutation choices

  • Method Details

    • mutate

      public Program mutate(Program program)
      Applies one or more random mutations to the input program. Wraps the static mutate method for instance-based mutation.
      Parameters:
      program - program to mutate
      Returns:
      mutated program

    • mutate

      public static Program mutate(Program root, Random random)
      Applies zero or more random mutations to the input program.
      Parameters:
      root - program to mutate
      random - randomness source controlling target and operation selection
      Returns:
      mutated program (or original when no mutation is chosen)

    • selectRandomNode

      public static ASTNode selectRandomNode(ASTNode root, Random random)
      Selects a random AST node by subtree-size-weighted index.
      Parameters:
      root - root node to sample from
      random - randomness source
      Returns:
      selected node within the subtree rooted at root

    • visit

      public ASTNode visit(Program program)
      Description copied from interface: ASTVisitor
      Visits a complete program node (top-level AST root).
      Specified by:
      visit in interface ASTVisitor<ASTNode>
      Parameters:
      program - the program containing all rules
      Returns:
      visitor-defined result for a program

    • visit

      public ASTNode visit(Rule rule)
      Description copied from interface: ASTVisitor
      Visits an individual rule node (condition + command pair). Provides rule-level granularity for policies or analyses that need to reason about rules as distinct units rather than just their constituent parts.
      Specified by:
      visit in interface ASTVisitor<ASTNode>
      Parameters:
      rule - the rule to visit
      Returns:
      visitor-defined result for a rule

    • visit

      Visits an action command node.
      Specified by:
      visit in interface ASTVisitor<ASTNode>
      Parameters:
      action - action command AST node
      Returns:
      visitor-defined result
